title: Two-seed OpenPose composition-control remediation for Base contact failure
result_summary: The canonical OpenPose lane preserved woman-owned shoulder/upper-arm contact without a clasp or handshake for both formerly failing seeds. Technical QA, diagnostic control pixel identity, and strict visual QA passed 2/2.
known_issues: Seed 7152026254 has a mildly stiff contact wrist, but hand ownership and placement remain clear.
The canonical Base lane's unconditioned adjacent-seed robustness result remains 0/2 and is not rewritten by this cross-lane remediation.
The result is local-only and does not establish target-runtime behavior or final certification for Base or OpenPose.
No gold mask, candidate mask, or mask promotion was used.
